executives.name: Mark Dankberg
executives.background: Mark Dankberg is a co-founder of Viasat and has served as Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer since its inception in 1986. He also served as President from 1986 to 2015. Under his leadership, Viasat has grown from a startup to a global leader in satellite communications.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Guru Gowrappan
executives.background: Guru Gowrappan joined Viasat as President in April 2023. Prior to joining Viasat, he served as CEO of Verizon Media from 2018 to 2021 and held various leadership roles at Alibaba Group and Yahoo.

executives.name: Shawn Duffy
executives.background: Shawn Duffy has served as Chief Financial Officer since 2014. She joined Viasat in 2005 and has held various roles including Corporate Controller and Vice President. Before Viasat, she was at Ernst & Young LLP.

executives.name: Kevin Harkenrider
executives.background: Kevin Harkenrider has served as Chief Operating Officer since 2021. He joined Viasat in 2006 and has held several executive positions, including President of Broadband Services.

board_of_directors.name: Mark Dankberg
board_of_directors.background: Co-founder, Chairman, and CEO of Viasat.

board_of_directors.name: Sean Pak
board_of_directors.background: Partner at Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan, LLP, specializing in intellectual property litigation. He has served on the board since 2020.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Johnson
board_of_directors.background: Former executive at various technology firms and has served on the Viasat board since 1986.

board_of_directors.name: Theresa Wise
board_of_directors.background: Former Senior Vice President and Chief Information Officer of Delta Air Lines. Joined the board in 2020.

board_of_directors.name: Varsha Rao
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Nurx and Head of Global Operations at Airbnb. Joined the board in 2017.

sources.source_description: Viasat, Inc. Definitive Proxy Statement (DEF 14A) filed July 25, 2024
